LOADING_I18N.developer_comment: Text displayed when the app is loading content.

TAP_TO_TURN_ON_I18N.developer_comment: Text displayed on a button to turn on a feature.

YOUR_CONDUIT_ID_I18N.developer_comment: Text displayed to the user to indicate their Conduit ID. The name 'Conduit' is the app name and should not be translated.

MAX_PUBLIC_PEERS_I18N.developer_comment: Label for the maximum number of public peers allowed.

MAX_PERSONAL_PEERS_I18N.developer_comment: Label for the maximum number of personal peers allowed.

MAX_TOTAL_PEERS_NOTE_I18N.string: Public and personal peers share a combined limit of {{max}}.
MAX_TOTAL_PEERS_NOTE_I18N.developer_comment: Helper text explaining the combined public and personal peer cap.

MAX_TOTAL_PEERS_ERROR_I18N.string: Reduce public or personal peers to keep the combined total at {{max}} or below.
MAX_TOTAL_PEERS_ERROR_I18N.developer_comment: Validation message shown when the combined public and personal peer limit is exceeded.

SETTINGS_CHANGE_WILL_RESTART_CONDUIT_DES.string: Changing Conduit settings requires restarting your Conduit Station. Any connected users will be disconnected.

LOCAL_CONDUIT_I18N.developer_comment: Title for the local conduit details modal.

TRY_AGAIN_I18N.developer_comment: Button label to retry a failed or offline operation.

ONBOARDING_WELCOME_BODY_I18N.string:
Turn your device into an Internet Freedom beacon!

You can help people around the world break through restrictive networks and access the global internet securely through the Psiphon Network.

ONBOARDING_WELCOME_BODY_IOS_I18N.string:
Help power Internet Freedom!

You can help people around the world break through restrictive networks and access the global internet securely through the Psiphon Network.

ONBOARDING_INFO_1_BODY_I18N.string:
Conduit is an open-source application that enables Psiphon users worldwide to bounce off your device and into the Psiphon Network.

The more Conduit Stations there are, the stronger Psiphon is and the more open the internet becomes.

ONBOARDING_INFO_1_BODY_IOS_I18N.string:
Conduit on iOS lets you create and manage cloud-hosted Conduit Stations that help Psiphon users reach the Psiphon Network.

Your device is used to manage your station, while the station itself runs in the cloud.

ONBOARDING_PERMISSIONS_BODY_I18N.string:
Conduit recommends you enable notifications so we can provide critical updates about your Conduit Station.

Ready to begin?

ONBOARDING_PERMISSIONS_BODY_IOS_I18N.string:
Conduit recommends you enable notifications so we can provide important updates about your account, subscription, and hosted Conduit Station.

Ready to begin?

ONBOARDING_HOSTED_BODY_I18N.string:
In addition to running a conduit directly on your device, you can subscribe to a hosted station for always-on support.

Hosted Conduit runs your station in the cloud, keeping it active 24/7 — even when your device is offline.

ONBOARDING_HOSTED_BODY_IOS_I18N.string:
On iOS, Conduit Stations are cloud-hosted.

A subscription keeps your station running in the cloud 24/7, even when your device is offline.

ONBOARDING_PRIVACY_POLICY_BODY_I18N.string:
We do not collect personally identifiable information from Conduit users. All transmitted data is encrypted and cannot be accessed by you or Psiphon. Connected users are not able to access your device in any way.

By using Conduit, you accept our privacy policy, available below.

ONBOARDING_PRIVACY_POLICY_BODY_IOS_I18N.string:
We do not collect personally identifiable information from Conduit users. Data sent by the iOS app is encrypted in transit, and other users do not access your device through the app.

By using Conduit, you accept our privacy policy, available below.
